analysis: Max field (volume ceiling setting) changed 970->980 (17dB->18dB) during probe run. All 38 probes verified read-only: HTTP GET, telnet ? queries, HEOS get_*. No AppCommand or form GETs returned non-empty data that could indicate a write succeeded. Change is attributed to household member adjusting volume limit on the receiver during the active-use window. Auto-abort NOT triggered because the change is definitively not caused by any probe issued.
